case_title: ELAINE HAUSMAN VS. JOHN HAMPTON FULLERTON

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAUSMAN, ELAINE , AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT FULLERTON, JOHN HAMPTON , AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAUSMAN, ELAINE , AN INDIVIDUAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FULLERTON, JOHN HAMPTON , AN INDIVIDUAL $51,763.20 PRINCIPAL, $435.87 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $52,634.07, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAUSMAN, ELAINE , AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER'S OFFICE
